resources.string: Select PPSE APDU Response - Cannot Find Directories tag BFOC. Try another card
Select PPSE APDU Response - no directories. Try another card
Directories Tag has invalid content. Try another card
Select PPSE Response is not FCI Template tag 6F. Try another card
Error while selecting ADF for first directory. Most likely, the card is not activated. Use another card
EmvTag Error 3. Invalid EMV Tag Length Length. Rank
EmvTag Error 4. Invalid EMV Tag Value Length=
Error 7. FindTag called for non-template
Error 8. Cannot find Tag
Syntax error 1. invalid rank parameter. Must be >0
Syntax error 2. Invalid rawData byte array
Syntax error 3. Invalid rawData or index
Syntax error 4. expectedLength can not be negative
This is a void EMV TAg for failed APDU Response
EmvTag Error 2. Invalid EMV Tag Code Length. Rank
EmvTag Error 5. Tag length is beyond the allocated raw data
The data retrieved from the card does not have PAN
Card might not be activated
**** The card summary below is copied to the clipboard
EMV Tag Codes are hexadecimal, Value Lengths are decimal, Values presented in hex and strings
**** You can now tap a card again ****
PAN (or Device PAN in case of Google Pay or Apple Pay) is retrieved from:
***** This card has more directories. If you tap it again, the next directory will be used *****
Purchase full version of NFC EMV EXPLORER to see all data\n\n
Retap the card and verify PAN/DPAN\n
\n ***** CONTENT IS HIDDEN *****\n
\n---- End of Response Content.\n
